name: @ideascol/vscode-extension-framework
description: Framework para crear VSCode extensions rapido con UI React/Svelte/Vue/Vanilla, RPC tipado webview-extension, y file-based routing de panels/commands

scripts.build: bun run gen:types && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/bin/cli.ts --target=node --outdir ./dist --format cjs

author: Jairo <jairofg12@gmail.com>
